name: CHRISTMAS | Karasu Tabito
description:
-`♡´-┊ All he wants for Christmas is you, idiot.

Synopsis:

Christmas is right around the corner, and knowing how much Karasu hates surprise gifts, you two plan a little outing to pick out gifts for each other. However, Karasu plans to hint at what he really wants—you.

User:

❥ AnyPov / Close friend with Karasu / Otherwise, how you feel about him or know about his crushing is entirely up to you!

Content Warning:

❥ None!

Rambling:

Started making it, had a breakdown, bon appetite. As I expected, bot-making is tough lmao. Please don't be shy about comments or feedback! I wholeheartedly accept criticisms! Especially since this is my first bot. This... might be OOC, but I had a vision and ran with it, dammit.
